form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 42-day let-up. First-up after three months sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 8 at Lyon-la-Soie on February 24 over 2150m, 3.5 len behind Starac with 56kg at $21. Previously second-up second last of 7 at Lyon-la-Soie on February 7 2025 over 1800m, 4 len behind Reach The Sky carrying 54.5kg at $24. Others make more appeal.

form.formComment: Filly back from a spell of 11 weeks. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation second of 15 at this track January 23 over 1900m, a long neck behind Saturday Night with 59.5kg at $17. First up last campaign fifth of 11 at Compiegne September 16 over 2000m, soft track; 3.5 len behind Millar carrying 54kg at $5. Can run a good race despite the gap between runs.
